relations.note: Usage guidance builds on the wave construction/colorway definition.

quotes: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

rules.intent: Preserve the signature layered translucent wave device with approved colorways.
rules.rule_text: Wave forms come in two colorways (Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each in long and short variants. Construction layers a top wave over the base wave at 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7) — Gold over Sunshine, Sky Blue over Deep Blue — and must always preserve the layered, translucent quality using approved color values only.

quotes: Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.

rules.intent: Guide flexible but on-brand deployment of the wave device.
rules.rule_text: Waves may be used alone or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds, to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Only approved color values may be used.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Standardize the approved copy-holding device in masthead positions.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine → light gold #ffe05c, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
